item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012) - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI - fix: bypass exportArchive for Developer ID — extract and codesign app from archive directly - chore: add ExportOptions plists to CI path filters - fix: use manual signing for Developer ID export — cloud signing not available (US-012) - fix: install iOS platform on macOS 15 CI runner before archive (US-010)
